name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and shred the carrot.
2. Peel and slice the cucumber.
3. Blend together the lemon juice, black pepper, chili powder, butter, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
4. On a salad plate, arrange the cucumber slices in two layers.
5. Pour the seasoned lemon juice over each layer.
6. Sprinkle the carrot shreds and coriander leaves on top of the final layer.
